summary: Phase 25: Taxonomy-driven Product Upload, Variants, and Bulk Import testing complete. 23/25 backend tests passed (92%). All frontend pages verified working. E2E product upload flow successful.

minor.issue: Accepts empty product_name - should validate required field

action_items: Consider adding backend validation for empty product_name in product upload
Consider adding backend validation for base_price_vat_inclusive > 0
test_credentials: Vendor: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!, Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!
seed_data_creation: Created test submissions with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 25 Product Upload Pack fully verified. Key findings: (1) GET /api/vendor/products/taxonomy returns capability-filtered taxonomy tree with groups/categories/subcategories, (2) POST /api/vendor/products/upload creates pending_review submission with product/supply/variants separation, (3) GET /api/vendor/products/my-submissions lists vendor's own submissions with optional status filter, (4) POST /api/vendor/products/import/validate parses CSV/XLS/XLSX, validates taxonomy, stores validation session server-side, (5) POST /api/vendor/products/import/{job_id}/confirm creates submissions from valid rows only, (6) GET /api/vendor/products/import/jobs lists vendor's import history, (7) GET /api/admin/vendor-supply/submissions lists all submissions with status/vendor filters, (8) POST /api/admin/vendor-supply/submissions/{id}/review approves/rejects with notes, (9) GET /api/admin/vendor-supply/import-jobs lists all import jobs, (10) Frontend VendorProductUploadPage has 5 sections (Taxonomy/Product Details/Images/Supply/Variants), (11) Frontend VendorBulkImportPage has 3-step flow (Upload/Preview/Confirm) with required/optional column guide, (12) Frontend AdminVendorSupplyReviewPage has Submissions and Import Jobs tabs with status filters and review actions.
